suite.name: Incident Report Api Test

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=http://localhost:3000/api, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '55', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "tester1@gmail.com", "password": "123456789"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Cookie': 'token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1xZnV6ZWEwMDAzNG9hdTFtZWRwaXUxIiwicm9sZSI6IkRSSVZFUiIsImlhdCI6MTc3MzczMDYwNSwiZXhwIjoxNzczNzM0MjA1fQ.7xLzPUZEDnpBmczkUX0FayOL-Jef4Y9o1vUUvZqpfjU', 'Content-Length': '55', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "admin@example.com", "password": "123456789"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

test.name: 1. User Should Be Able To Create An Incident

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.arg: description=รถชนท้ายกัน
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/incidents/ path_url=/api/incidents/ headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1xZnV6ZWEwMDAzNG9hdTFtZWRwaXUxIiwicm9sZSI6IkRSSVZFUiIsImlhdCI6MTc3MzczMDYwNSwiZXhwIjoxNzczNzM0MjA1fQ.7xLzPUZEDnpBmczkUX0FayOL-Jef4Y9o1vUUvZqpfjU', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Cookie': 'token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1xZmt2OWowMDAwNG9hdTU2djhpZnJsIiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNzMwNjA1LCJleHAiOjE3NzM3MzQyMDV9.h0RiL5QX5GmoAK4NaZLA6YmawMO_eNoifk7hkS4sYoE', 'Content-Length': '109'} body=b'{"category": "ACCIDENT", "description": "\\u0e23\\u0e16\\u0e0a\\u0e19\\u0e17\\u0e49\\u0e32\\u0e22\\u0e01\\u0e31\\u0e19"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

test.doc: ผู้ใช้สร้างการแจ้งเหตุใหม่ (POST /) โดยไม่ส่ง Location

test.name: 2. User Should Be Able To Get Their Own Incidents

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/incidents/my path_url=/api/incidents/my headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1xZnV6ZWEwMDAzNG9hdTFtZWRwaXUxIiwicm9sZSI6IkRSSVZFUiIsImlhdCI6MTc3MzczMDYwNSwiZXhwIjoxNzczNzM0MjA1fQ.7xLzPUZEDnpBmczkUX0FayOL-Jef4Y9o1vUUvZqpfjU', 'Cookie': 'token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1xZmt2OWowMDAwNG9hdTU2djhpZnJsIiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNzMwNjA1LCJleHAiOjE3NzM3MzQyMDV9.h0RiL5QX5GmoAK4NaZLA6YmawMO_eNoifk7hkS4sYoE'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

test.doc: ผู้ใช้ดึงประวัติการแจ้งเหตุของตัวเอง (GET /my)

test.name: 3. User Should Be Able To Get Incident By ID

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

test.doc: ผู้ใช้ดูรายละเอียดเคสรายตัว (GET /:id)

test.name: 4. User Should Be Able To Add Evidence To Incident

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

test.doc: ผู้ใช้อัปโหลดหลักฐานเพิ่มเติม (POST /:id/evidence)

test.name: 5. Admin Should Be Able To Get All Incidents

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/incidents/admin/all path_url=/api/incidents/admin/all headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1xZmt2OWowMDAwNG9hdTU2djhpZnJsIiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNzMwNjA1LCJleHAiOjE3NzM3MzQyMDV9.h0RiL5QX5GmoAK4NaZLA6YmawMO_eNoifk7hkS4sYoE', 'Cookie': 'token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1xZmt2OWowMDAwNG9hdTU2djhpZnJsIiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNzMwNjA1LCJleHAiOjE3NzM3MzQyMDV9.h0RiL5QX5GmoAK4NaZLA6YmawMO_eNoifk7hkS4sYoE'} body=None

มีผู้บาดเจ็บเล็กน้อย ต้องการความช่วยเหลือด่วน","status":"RESOLVED","location":{"lat":15.27077892932... (set the log level to DEBUG or TRACE to see the full content)
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: แอดมินดึงรายการการแจ้งเหตุทั้งหมด (GET /admin/all)

test.name: 6. Admin Should Be Able To Assign Incident

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: PATCH On Session
kw.doc: Sends a PATCH request on a previously created HTTP Session.

test.doc: แอดมินรับเรื่องเคส (PATCH /admin/:id/assign)

test.name: 7. Admin Should Be Able To Resolve Incident

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${payload} = {'adminNotes': 'ตรวจสอบและจัดการเรียบร้อยแล้ว'}
kw.arg: adminNotes=ตรวจสอบและจัดการเรียบร้อยแล้ว
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: PATCH On Session
kw.doc: Sends a PATCH request on a previously created HTTP Session.

test.doc: แอดมินปิดเคส (PATCH /admin/:id/resolve)

test.name: 8. Create Another Incident For Cancel And Reject Tests

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${payload} = {'category': 'OTHER', 'description': 'เคสสำหรับยกเลิก'}
kw.arg: description=เคสสำหรับยกเลิก
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/incidents/ path_url=/api/incidents/ headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1xZnV6ZWEwMDAzNG9hdTFtZWRwaXUxIiwicm9sZSI6IkRSSVZFUiIsImlhdCI6MTc3MzczMDYwNSwiZXhwIjoxNzczNzM0MjA1fQ.7xLzPUZEDnpBmczkUX0FayOL-Jef4Y9o1vUUvZqpfjU', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Cookie': 'token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1xZmt2OWowMDAwNG9hdTU2djhpZnJsIiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNzMwNjA1LCJleHAiOjE3NzM3MzQyMDV9.h0RiL5QX5GmoAK4NaZLA6YmawMO_eNoifk7hkS4sYoE', 'Content-Length': '130'} body=b'{"category": "OTHER", "description": "\\u0e40\\u0e04\\u0e2a\\u0e2a\\u0e33\\u0e2b\\u0e23\\u0e31\\u0e1a\\u0e22\\u0e01\\u0e40\\u0e25\\u0e34\\u0e01"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

test.doc: สร้างเคสที่ 2 เพื่อเอาไว้เทสต์การ Cancel/Reject

test.name: 9. Admin Should Be Able To Reject Incident

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${payload} = {'adminNotes': 'ข้อมูลไม่เพียงพอ'}
kw.arg: adminNotes=ข้อมูลไม่เพียงพอ
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: PATCH On Session
kw.doc: Sends a PATCH request on a previously created HTTP Session.

test.doc: แอดมินปัดตกเคส (PATCH /admin/:id/reject)

test.name: 10. User Should Be Able To Cancel Their Own Incident

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${payload} = {'category': 'OTHER', 'description': 'ผู้ใช้กดยกเลิกเอง'}
kw.arg: description=ผู้ใช้กดยกเลิกเอง
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/incidents/ path_url=/api/incidents/ headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1xZnV6ZWEwMDAzNG9hdTFtZWRwaXUxIiwicm9sZSI6IkRSSVZFUiIsImlhdCI6MTc3MzczMDYwNSwiZXhwIjoxNzczNzM0MjA1fQ.7xLzPUZEDnpBmczkUX0FayOL-Jef4Y9o1vUUvZqpfjU', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Cookie': 'token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1xZmt2OWowMDAwNG9hdTU2djhpZnJsIiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNzMwNjA1LCJleHAiOjE3NzM3MzQyMDV9.h0RiL5QX5GmoAK4NaZLA6YmawMO_eNoifk7hkS4sYoE', 'Content-Length': '142'} body=b'{"category": "OTHER", "description": "\\u0e1c\\u0e39\\u0e49\\u0e43\\u0e0a\\u0e49\\u0e01\\u0e14\\u0e22\\u0e01\\u0e40\\u0e25\\u0e34\\u0e01\\u0e40\\u0e2d\\u0e07"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: PATCH On Session
kw.doc: Sends a PATCH request on a previously created HTTP Session.

test.doc: ผู้ใช้ยกเลิกการแจ้งเหตุของตัวเอง (PATCH /:id/cancel)

suite.doc: API Test Suite for Incident Report System
